use_cases: Display user profile avatars with fallback initials in dashboards and user lists
Show real-time online/offline/busy/away status indicators for team collaboration tools
Render profile pictures in comment sections, chat interfaces, and social feeds
Display user avatars in notification systems and activity feeds
Create avatar components for admin panels and user management interfaces
ai_summary: A reusable Avatar component system built with Radix UI primitives that provides profile picture display with automatic fallback handling and configurable status indicators (online, offline, busy, away). The component uses CVA for variant management and follows a minimalist flat design suitable for dashboards, user profiles, and collaboration tools across SaaS and social platforms.
